summary: Backend testing of P1 date-filtering bug fixes. 18/19 tests passed (1 skipped due to session handling). Key P1 fixes verified: (1) get_current_inventory(as_of_date) correctly filters transactions by date - tested with CHAIN MS-70 showing old_gr_wt=-29722 for 2026-02-28 vs old_gr_wt=13162 for 2026-03-31. (2) Upload-preview passes verification_date to get_current_inventory() for date-scoped base. (3) Compare endpoint uses _flat_base_from_inventory() preserving member identity. (4) Compare returns gross_difference, book_gross_wt, physical_gross_wt fields.
critical_code_review_comments: Date filtering in get_current_inventory(as_of_date) correctly filters: transactions (date <= as_of_date), baselines (baseline_date <= as_of_date), polythene (date <= as_of_date)
get_effective_physical_base_for_date() now passes verification_date to _flat_base_from_inventory(), which passes it to get_current_inventory()
_flat_base_from_inventory() helper extracted and reused by both upload-preview and compare endpoint
Compare endpoint now uses _flat_base_from_inventory() instead of get_book_closing_stock_as_of_date(), preserving member identity
Compare endpoint returns: gross_difference, gross_difference_kg, book_gross_wt, physical_gross_wt - all present in matches/discrepancies
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data for testing. Key test case: CHAIN MS-70 has transactions on 2026-03-02 allowing verification of date filtering (before/after transaction gives different base values)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 date-filtering fixes fully verified. Key verification: upload-preview with verification_date=2026-02-28 for CHAIN MS-70 returns old_gr_wt=-29722 (before Mar 2 purchase), while verification_date=2026-03-31 returns old_gr_wt=13162 (after purchase). Compare endpoint confirmed to use same identity model as current stock via _flat_base_from_inventory(). Test files updated to use verification_date=2100-01-01 for baseline-dependent tests (ITEM-ALPHA has baseline_date=2099-12-31).

date_filtering_inventory.evidence: CHAIN MS-70: verification_date=2026-02-28 gives old_gr_wt=-29722, verification_date=2026-03-31 gives old_gr_wt=13162

upload_preview_date_scoped_base.description: Upload-preview base values change based on verification_date

compare_same_identity_model.description: Compare endpoint uses _flat_base_from_inventory() for consistent identity with current stock

compare_gross_difference_fields.description: Compare returns gross_difference, gross_difference_kg, book_gross_wt, physical_gross_wt
compare_gross_difference_fields.evidence: Sample item has all fields: book_gross_wt, physical_gross_wt, gross_difference, gross_difference_kg

current_inventory_regression.description: GET /api/inventory/current still returns full inventory without date filtering

group_resolution.description: Group members (SNT-40 PREMIUM, TULSI 70 BELT) resolve to leaders in upload-preview
group_resolution.evidence: Upload with group member names successfully resolves via name_to_base_key lookup
